# Bug Report

## Log files

⚠️ **If a issue does not include log files it will be closed after a week if it is not amended.** ⚠️

Please ensure to visit your cadmium folder and attach **all** the files contained in the **logs folder** as they are crucial for developers to reproduce your problem and diagnose the issue, please keep in mind to **check the log folders for potential sensitive information** you do not wish to be available on the internet. 

If you do not see any files contained in the logs folder please check your configuration.json file and ensure logging is enabled.
